message:
fix(import): make stand-in ID resolution case-insensitive

Stand-in ID lookup was case-sensitive while title lookup was
case-insensitive, creating an inconsistency: defining `### ID DB-1`
and referencing `db-1` in dependencies would fail silently.

Both maps now normalize to lowercase on insert and lookup.

Also removes a dead `is_empty` guard in `split_dependency_content` —
empty lines are already filtered before the bulleted branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
